catalyst.event: Q2 2026 earnings release confirming sustained overseas volume growth AND gross margin holding at/above 17.2% TTM level, forcing consensus EPS upward revision and a re-rating from 'domestic price warrior' to 'global vertically-integrated leader'
catalyst.source: Q1 broker review cycle dated 2026-04-30 to 2026-05-08 (TUSHARE: 华创证券, 华金证券, 东方证券, 国联民生证券, 招商证券) sets the testable bar; exact Q2 release date not available in our data

rightIf_conditions: Q2 2026 reported gross margin ≥ 17.2% (current TTM level) — confirms mix-shift thesis intact
Q2 2026 overseas sales volume shows continued sequential growth consistent with broker '海外销量增长势头强劲' language
Consensus FY2026 NP estimates revised upward ≥5% within 2 weeks of Q2 report
Price sustainably breaks and holds above the ¥103.2/¥104.0 chip-cluster resistance band (combined 18.64% of float)
May/June 2026 monthly export sales prints maintain the Q1 momentum that sell-side cited
wrongIf_conditions: Q2 2026 gross margin drops below 15% (WATCHLIST wrongIf trigger)
Mgmt Q2 commentary explicitly cites European price competition / localization pressure as a margin driver
Consensus FY2026 NP revised DOWN post-Q2, or broker downgrades from the same houses (华创/华金/东方/国联民生) that just upgraded
Price fails at ¥104 cluster and breaks back below ¥95 on volume (loss of 60d momentum structure)
Margin financing 融资余额 reverses materially (>5% drawdown from 140.1亿) signaling leveraged-long capitulation
what_changes_our_mind: Q2 2026 reported gross margin falls below 15% (WATCHLIST wrongIf threshold) AND mgmt commentary attributes it to European price competition — would validate the localization-erosion mechanism.
variant_view_one_sentence: Market believes BYD's overseas growth is volume without margin (anchored to -11.8% TTM rev, 4.8% Op Margin, and Stellantis-Leapmotor localization news) → We believe vertical integration makes exports a durable mix-shift tailwind already visible in 国联民生 2026-04-30 Q1 QoQ GM improvement → Mechanism is Q2 print converting Q1 margin trajectory + sell-side narrative coherence (5 brokers, April inst visits by Value Partners/国寿/高盛) into consensus EPS upward revisions, closing the reverse-DCF 15.1% vs 28.0% growth gap.
time_to_resolution: 10-16 weeks (through Q2 2026 earnings + immediate revision cycle)

quantification.metric_target: Forward P/E re-rating accompanying consensus EPS upward revision
